apple.customMessage: Passionate about creating innovative Apple platform experiences with 7+ years of iOS development.

apple-appstore.customDescription: 7+ years at LINE building polished, user-facing UIs with Swift, Objective-C, UIKit, and SwiftUI. Led iOS teams for camera and AI features serving hundreds of millions of users. Framework-level experience with internal camera/graphics SDK — CI/CD pipelines, Objective-C runtime debugging, and API design. Eager to help developers showcase their apps to customers worldwide.
apple-appstore.customDescriptionKo: LINE에서 7년 이상 Swift, Objective-C, UIKit, SwiftUI로 사용자 중심 UI를 개발. 수억 명의 사용자를 위한 카메라 및 AI 기능의 iOS 팀을 리드. 내부 카메라/그래픽스 SDK 프레임워크 경험 — CI/CD 파이프라인, Objective-C 런타임 디버깅, API 설계. 전 세계 고객에게 앱을 선보이는 개발자를 돕고 싶습니다.

roleMapping.title: How My Background Maps to the Role
roleMapping.titleKo: 내 경력이 이 역할에 어떻게 부합하는가
roleMapping.subtitle: Apple · iOS Engineer - App Store

items.description: 7+ years of iOS — LINE Avatar (2019) with Objective-C/Swift interop, Yuki framework team with Objective-C runtime debugging and CI/CD. Strong OOP patterns including MVVM architecture migration.
items.descriptionKo: 7년 이상 iOS 개발 — LINE Avatar(2019)에서 Objective-C/Swift 상호운용, Yuki 프레임워크 팀에서 Objective-C 런타임 디버깅 및 CI/CD. MVVM 아키텍처 마이그레이션 등 강력한 OOP 패턴.

items.description: LINE Voom Camera — AVFoundation capture, real-time preview with Metal/Core Image, custom UI components. Vision Pro 'Immersive Memory' built entirely with SwiftUI and RealityKit.
items.descriptionKo: LINE Voom Camera — AVFoundation 캡처, Metal/Core Image 실시간 프리뷰, 커스텀 UI 컴포넌트. Vision Pro 'Immersive Memory'는 SwiftUI와 RealityKit으로 구축.

items.description: LINE AI Dev 2 — URLSession-based SSE streaming for real-time AI responses, Combine and async/await for reactive data flow. GCD/OperationQueue for thread-safe video composition in Voom Camera.
items.descriptionKo: LINE AI Dev 2 — 실시간 AI 응답을 위한 URLSession 기반 SSE 스트리밍, Combine과 async/await로 리액티브 데이터 흐름. Voom Camera에서 GCD/OperationQueue로 스레드 안전한 비디오 합성.

items.description: Yuki framework — designed internal SDK APIs consumed by multiple product teams. LINE AI Dev 2 — coordinated API contracts with backend engineers for streaming chat protocol.
items.descriptionKo: Yuki 프레임워크 — 여러 제품 팀이 사용하는 내부 SDK API 설계. LINE AI Dev 2 — 스트리밍 채팅 프로토콜을 위해 백엔드 엔지니어와 API 계약 조율.

items.description: iOS lead for Voom Camera and LINE AI — collaborate with PM, designers, server, and QA across LINE Plus global organizations (JP/KR/TW). Deliver features on time while handling stakeholder expectations.
items.descriptionKo: Voom Camera와 LINE AI의 iOS 리드 — LINE Plus 글로벌 조직(JP/KR/TW) 전반에 걸쳐 PM, 디자이너, 서버, QA와 협업. 이해관계자 기대를 관리하며 기능을 적시에 제공.

google.customMessage: Experienced in AI integration and mobile development, eager to contribute to Google's innovative products.

meta.customMessage: Passionate about spatial computing and immersive experiences, ready to shape the future of AR/VR.

startup.customMessage: Full-stack mobile developer with team leadership experience, ready to build products from 0 to 1.
